title: Problem Discovery Before Solution Commitment · Independent Product Trial
summary: An independent public-benefit team supplies different users, constraints, risks, technology, data, and failure conditions and transfers problem discovery before solution commitment into a changed problem evidence dossier. Planned artifact: Produce an independent changed-context version of problem evidence dossier with automated and judgment evidence. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome.
Observe or reconstruct the current workflow with roles, triggers, inputs, handoffs, delays, exceptions, and consequences.
Compare direct observation, interview, artifact, analytics, support, market, and assumption evidence for relevance and bias.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.

starterFiles.config:
# personal-project-1 cumulative independent product evidence portfolio
# Browser labs perform deterministic evidence-contract review only.
# They never contact participants or services, execute commands, deploy, or claim live conformance.
workspace: portfolio
project-id: personal-project-1
stakeholder: [replace with affected people and accountable decision owner]
decision: [replace with the decision this evidence changes]
problem-evidence: [replace with observed need, counterevidence, and uncertainty]
accessibility: [replace with keyboard, structure, reflow, status, alternatives, and human review]
security: [replace with threat, authorization, abuse, response, and residual risk]
privacy: [replace with purpose, minimization, retention, access, correction, and deletion]
test-strategy: [replace with behavior, changed case, fault, accessibility, security, and recovery]
release-evidence: [replace with revision, artifact, inventory, provenance, validation, and rollback]
recovery: [replace with backup, clean restore, reconciliation, communication, and ownership]
portfolio-proof: [replace with contribution, limitations, counterexample, and unseen defense]
transfer-boundary: authorized controlled research, toolchain, deployment, and review environments
evidence:

steps.title: Commit to the mission model · Lab Request Vs Need
steps.instruction:
lab case — A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The lab variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim

What must be established before implementation?

Evidence target: Commit to the mission model · Lab Request Vs Need.
steps.why: The decision supplies observable evidence for separate the requested feature from the user need, stakeholder decision, current behavior, and desired outcome. For Commit to the mission model · Lab Request Vs Need, keep Request Vs Need connected to mechanically reviewable stakeholder, affected-user, artifact, changed-case, failure, repair, release, recovery, and transfer decision evidence.

content.text: A neighborhood service requests a mobile app while observed handoffs suggest the delay comes from policy, language access, and incomplete intake information. The lab variation 2 changes the stakeholder, access need, evidence source, constraint, failure, and operating environment. Competency probe: defend one bounded product claim
